name: Goat Mimic
description: Circle 8 (Fraud) — shape-shifting trickster goat. Disguises as props, ambush attacker.

textToImageTask.prompt: A bipedal humanoid goat demon trickster in A-pose, slim angular deceptive build, patchwork multi-colored fur that shifts between wood-grain brown and stone-gray like camouflage, mismatched horns one straight one curved, multiple small arms hidden under a long chameleon-like cloak that mimics dungeon textures, one hand holds a curved dagger the other a small mirror, digitigrade goat legs, shifting heterochromatic eyes one green one yellow, stylized dark fantasy game character, full body front view, dark background

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Slim angular bipedal goat demon trickster, patchwork camouflage fur, mismatched horns, chameleon cloak, curved dagger, A-pose

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: Patchwork fur shifting between wood brown and stone gray, chameleon texture cloak, curved dark steel dagger, cracked mirror, heterochromatic green-yellow eyes
